robotics.pipeline: LeWM (15M) → projection (lewm_dim→vjepa2_dim) → VLA-JEPA predictor (Hermes-4.3-36B layers 8-16) → dual loss NTP + JEPA (QLoRA, A100 80GB) → LoRA merge → distillation → Hermes-3-8B Q4_K_M → tool calls → robot execution (Jetson Orin Nano)
robotics.hermes_tool_call_format: Template header : <|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|> Tool calls : <tool_call>{...}</tool_call> Thinking mode : enable_thinking=True injects <think> prefix vLLM parser : --tool-call-parser hermes --enable-auto-tool-choice SGLang parser : --tool-call-parser qwen25 Sampling : temperature=0.6, top_p=0.95, top_k=20
robotics.distillation_constraint: Student sees ONLY current observation — no future frame leakage (VLA-JEPA principle)
